config.zigzag_source: CSV Zig Zag Line Length (abs, both directions) — Sierra Chart HL-based

phase2_queue.item: Clock-time rolling window (60 min) vs 200-swing count window
phase2_queue.rationale: Open block inflates P90 which persists into afternoon via 200-swing window. Afternoon profits with tighter params (NPF=1.17). A time-based window would give afternoon trades appropriately tighter thresholds instead of using morning volatility data. Test last 60 min of zigzag swings as rolling window.

Open block has NPF=0.8252, EV=-13.1/cycle, 29.6% cap-walk rate. It is the single largest source of losses (-8335 ticks). Removing it removes the drag. Test watch_mode=rth_open but delay seed acceptance to 10:00 ET.

phase2_queue.item: SpeedRead quintile diagnostic broken by block
phase2_queue.rationale: Open may show strong speed-quality gradient (fast Open cycles worst) while Afternoon may show flat (speed irrelevant when cycles already good). Block-level SR analysis informs whether SR filter can selectively fix the Open problem without hurting profitable blocks.

phase2_queue.item: SpeedRead filter: seed and reversal SR thresholds
Feature filters: regime detection, volatility gates
